resources.string: Users can tap to skip the splash screen
Compatible with old devices, smaller APK
Best for modern devices, smaller APK
Execute translation automatically after page loads
One URL per line, format: URL or Name|URL
Add BGM to app; supports loop or sequential play
Interface enhancements for Bilibili: homepage, search, and video pages
Extract highest quality video and audio streams from Bilibili
Click to select or use button below
Configure a model supporting module dev in AI settings first
Main and www domains auto-match; add extra domains here (one per line)
Allow opening matched links from external sources
Are you sure you want to delete this app?
Hide app identity to prevent identification or removal
ℹ️ Note: Disguise requires Device Admin permission. Multi-icon may be limited on some devices.
Replace or insert snippets at specific locations
Tap below to create your first app
Use AI to generate and embed images into HTML
Unified hosts file for ads and malware
e.g., A blue gradient music player icon
Use AI to generate app icon
AI generated icons will be saved here
• AI API key required\n• Complex features may need multiple adjustments\n• Verify effects on the test page
Inject Service Worker for offline browsing of visited pages
Cache First (Fastest load; content may be stale)
Network First (Recommended; latest content, offline cache)
Stale While Revalidate (Immediate cache; background update)
No static files found in Python project\n(Backend apps require Python runtime)
Create a modern minimalist homepage with TailwindCSS, including nav, hero, portfolio, and contact sections.
Make a glassmorphism login page with a dark gradient background and social login buttons.
Create a cyberpunk 404 error page with neon effects and glitch animations.
Make a music player UI, dark theme, with vinyl rotation, progress bar, and play controls.
Create a weather card component showing different icons and backgrounds based on weather type.
Make a responsive image gallery with masonry layout and lightbox effects.
Create a TO-DO app with add, complete, and delete features using localStorage.
Make a countdown page showing days, hours, and minutes with flip animations.
Click to generate random app name
• Describe specific features\n• State target site/page type\n• Refer to example prompts
Focus on motion and interaction effects
Suitable for data collection and forms
Full TO-DO app with Material Design UI; supports tasks CRUD
Real-time system dashboard showing CPU/RAM usage; dark theme
Markdown notes with real-time preview and search features
React 18 TO-DO app demonstrating Hooks usage
Vue 3 responsive counter using Composition API
Vite + Vanilla JS weather app; framework-free
Select icon or use AI to generate new one
Show draggable floating translation button in bottom-right
App Store coming soon\nDiscover and share amazing apps

First-principles design; independent of Node.js runtime:

• Kotlin packager for simple projects
• High-perf esbuild native binary
• Progressive fallback strategy

Run npm run build on PC then import output.
💡 Test page loads selected modules to observe behavior
Bundles project and node_modules into one file; reduces APK size
Compiles TS to JS via esbuild before launch for better performance
Fixes Canvas/Unity scaling and UI clipping issues
Create or overwrite full HTML pages
